title: Swamp Boat
description: Adds a swamp boat to mangrove swamps
body:
**This mod adds a swamp boat to the mangrove swamps, packed with loot and villagers.**

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23c1d6fbf42ea37273f5b6aa4e2853eca1da4243.jpeg)

- Manned by swamp villagers, primarily fishermen.
- Contains loot focused on fishing, scattered throughout the boat

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd86aadc77c66633b86ea193abf6b961777dfe07.jpeg)


- The boat Spawns in mangrove swamp and warm ocean biomes.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b583d8416184199fb132dab4fd9dfc5f2e3f482c.jpeg)


Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
